member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetExplorerResultBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with the results of a budget explorer request.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetGroupedEntriesToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with budget transaction entries grouped by year.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetRequestVoucherBuilder
member.summary: Builds a PDF file with a budget request transaction with its associated order data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetTransactionByYearVoucherBuilder
member.summary: Builds a PDF file with a voucher for a budget transaction with year months in columns.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetUngroupedEntriesToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with ungrouped budget transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.Budgeting.Reporting.BudgetTransactionReportingService
member.summary: Provides services used to generate budget transactions reports.

member.summary: Builds an Excel file with cash ledger accounts analysis.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashEntriesToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with cash ledger transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashFlowExplorerToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with cash flow explorer results.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashTransactionToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with cash ledger transactions and their entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashTransactionTotalsToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file with cash ledger transactions totals.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashTransactionVoucherBuilder
member.summary: Builds a Pdf file with a voucher for a cash transaction.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.ConceptsAnalyticsToExcelBuilder
member.summary: Builds an Excel file containing concepts analytics by account report.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashFlowReportingService
member.summary: Provides services used to generate cash flow reports.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.Reporting.CashTransactionReportingService
member.summary: Provides services used to generate cash transactions reports.

member.summary: Builds an Excel file with payment order entries.
